# Pen Nib

## Description

Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with multi-hit and high-damage attacks; track the counter so Dismantle, Neow's Fury, Pommel Strike, or Breakthrough can receive the doubled hit.
